steps.title: Define evidence of urbanism
steps.content: The conclusion is that the Casarabe people developed a form of urbanism. Support should show concentrated settlements, planned construction, or infrastructure in the Amazon basin.

steps.title: Reject sparse-settlement evidence
steps.content:
• Choice A: Small, widely separated settlements surrounded by jungle support the older sparse-population view.
  • Choice B: Cities outside Casarabe territory do not show Casarabe urbanism.
  • Choice C: Scattered small farms are not evidence of urban settlement.

steps.title: Use dense linked settlements
steps.content: Monumental platforms, dense central settlements, and canals and roads linking smaller settlements are the kind of organized infrastructure that supports urbanism. The answer is D.
